Levels.Biphasic: Biphasic pulse shape as per stimulator setting

stimulus_duration.Description: Time during which a contiguous non-zero current is applied through the coil

pattern1_frequency.LongName: Frequency of interval between stimuli in pattern1 (burst)
pattern1_frequency.Description: Frequency of interval from the start of the first stimulus to the start of the proceeding stimulus in pattern1 (burst)

pattern1_count.LongName: Number of stimuli in repeating pattern (burst)
pattern1_count.Description: Total number stimuli in repeating pattern (burst)

pattern2_frequency.LongName: Frequency of interval between stimuli in pattern2 (train)
pattern2_frequency.Description: Frequency of interval from the start of the first stimulus in pattern1 block to the start of the first stimulus in subsequent pattern1 block (train)

pattern2_duration.Description: Duration of pattern1 repeats including stimulus duration and interval duration (train)

pattern3_count.Description: Total number of times pattern 2 repeats (sequence)

pattern3_duration.Description: Duration of pattern2 repeats including patten2 duration and interval duration (sequence)
